title: Business 101
description: The core business toolkit for founders and operators: sizing a market, unit economics, SaaS metrics, and going to market — taught the way you'll actually use it.

lessons.title: Market sizing: TAM, SAM, SOM
outcomes: Define TAM, SAM, and SOM and how they nest
Recognise that SOM must be a realistic subset of SAM, not all of it
Distinguish top-down from bottom-up market sizing

quiz.question: Order these from largest to smallest.
A founder sets SOM equal to the entire SAM (100% in year one). What's wrong?
options: SOM should be a realistic slice you can actually win, not the whole market
SOM must be larger than SAM

quiz.question: Estimating the market as (number of buyers × price per buyer) is which approach?

lessons.title: Unit economics: gross margin
outcomes: Compute gross margin as (price − cost) / price
Explain why the denominator is price, not cost (margin vs markup)

quiz.question: Gross margin divides profit by which of these?

lessons.title: Unit economics: LTV and CAC payback
outcomes: State the LTV formula: ARPU × gross margin % × average lifespan
Define CAC and the CAC payback period
Explain why a shorter payback is better for cash flow

quiz.question: CAC is…
options: What you spend to acquire one customer (sales + marketing ÷ new customers)
The cost to build the product

quiz.question: A shorter CAC payback period is…
options: Better — you recover the acquisition cost faster, easing cash flow

lessons.title: SaaS metrics: churn and retention
outcomes: Define churn as the % of customers who cancel in a period

quiz.question: Churn measures…
options: Customers who cancel or stop paying in a period

quiz.question: You started the month with 200 customers and 10 cancelled. What's the monthly churn rate?

lessons.title: Go-to-market and pricing
outcomes: Describe a go-to-market motion as a target segment plus a channel to reach them
Contrast value-based pricing with cost-plus pricing

quiz.question: A basic go-to-market motion pairs…
options: A target segment with a channel to reach them

quiz.question: Value-based pricing sets the price based on…
distractors: what it costs you to deliver
